evals.prompt: plan a 30 second short answering why do your ears pop on planes. I want the full thing - script, shots, and the exact steps to make it with my AI tools. remember I'm not an editor
evals.expected_output: A complete VIDEO-PLAN: 3 hook variants, an 82-90 word script that loops back to the opening, a shot list with per-shot durations <=3s, a production recipe naming the current stack (Seedream 4 keyframes + Kling 3.0 via fal.ai/Krea, OpenAI TTS, free music/SFX, DaVinci Resolve, 1080p->4K upscale) and NOT naming OpenArt-for-video or Suno-as-default, and a filled compliance checklist with a named originality layer.

evals.prompt: give me 5 curiosity video ideas for the youtube channel and fully plan out the strongest one
evals.expected_output: 5+ curiosity ideas scored/compared, the strongest one fully planned with all VIDEO-PLAN sections: hooks, timed script, shot list, production recipe, compliance checklist, measurement plan.
